reviews_data.review_text:
Good food. Great service.

4.5 stars

The staff are amazing, patient and polite, it is always clean, a very calm and relax atmosphere. The food is great, I got the Spicy chicken Fiesta sandwich with a cherry lime drink, since my birthday was yesterday I got a free pastry of my choice
Drive thru, sausage breakfast sandwich to share with my pup.  We both enjoyed it.

I ordered through Uber Eats. Not feeling well I ordered chicken soup and a banana. The banana was black and mushy and small for the price. I tried to call to let them know and they hung up on me. I called back with no answer. Unimpressed

Food tastes great, but Panera has the biggest discrepancy between the pictures of the food and what you actually receive.
You enter your order yourself, and pick up your food at the window, so there isn't any service. Toilets are gross.
It's good food, but you can get as good or better sandwiches elsewhere at the same price or better, and not feel like you are getting ripped off.

I ordered online the doordash person super kind and willing to go back to store for me. I got a abysmal sandwich that tasted old stale ships and they forgot my drink I spent around $16-$18 before delivery this place is not worth it go to subway or anywhere else. 1 star

If you are excited to eat your favorite food from Panera, find another location. I promise you they don’t have what you need in stock. I have made this repeat mistake 3 times now unfortunately. The first trip, they didn’t have mac and cheese. Second trip, they didn’t have BREAD!? Panera bread straight up didn’t have bread… This time they didn’t have tomato slices for sandwiches. Management is completely and utterly failing this panera team by not equipping them with the resources they need to succeed.

This is also the grossest bathroom I have ever seen for a Panera. Most gas station bathrooms are cleaner than this place. It’s absolutely repulsive and I will never return here again.
Love their bagels but I wish they had at least one more cream cheese option like veggie for the cheesy bagels. Service is great here and prices are like other places. I also love their coffee.
Always good service, food is fresh and delicious. I love all the menu choices of sandwiches, soups, pastas and pastries. I can never decide on one thing, so the Pick 2 is a great way to go!

review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Large vegetarian selection, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text: I LOVE the breakfast souffles, especially the cheese one. I always get  a couple of extras for home.
There was some issues ordering on the tablets.  I order from a staff member. It was quick and easy.
Amazing worker , She was fast and efficient. I think her name was Raja ...I'm not certain but she was great .

This Panera is so hit or miss. You never know what type of quality or customer service you’ll get. Today both were lacking. I ordered the chicken chipotle avocado melt and the bread was burnt and there was hardly anything but chicken on the sandwich.

Mellissa helped me at the Gastonia Panera location. She was very friendly, helpful and ensured everything I got through the drive-through was correct. She double checked that I got my chips andy large drink and everything was received as ordered. She was a friendly person to speak with and does a great job!

I got an assortment of pastries and they were good as usual. However, they were subpar on the coffee. I wanted dark roast but it was empty. The spot for medium roast didn't even have a pot in place and the only other option was caffeine-free. The lady that checked me out offered to brew a fresh pot and give me a cup. I sat down and waited. It didn't take but 2 or 3 minutes and she came out with a cup. But it was only lukewarm. 🥴
Shrinkflation has hit this place hard...got a full size greek salad that was SO skimpy and then they had the audacity to leave the romaine butt in there.
Yummy

$7.00 chicken avocado egg sandwich was on a tiny piece of bread. Half of the sandwich has absolutely no chicken on it. I normally don't do reviews, but Panera's portions have changed to very small in the last few years. It's really disappointing to eat there anymore. My last meal there was a very small focaccia chicken sandwich, and a bowl of soup from a bag, and it was $22.00.  woman was very nice at the register.
kayla was supper sweet and helped me pick the broccoli cheddar it’s so delicious
Staff RUSH you. There were no cars behind me so huffing and groaning “ready when you are” was ridiculous
Food came early and they gave me a mini cookie and brownie for free. Usually get food here but this was really cute and I wanted to show me appreciation
Always messing up my online orders.
Love the broccoli cheese soup

I ordered here a few weeks ago and am only posting this now because I'd been emailing a manager from panera and was waiting to see how things ended before writing this.

I'm a vegetarian and ordered the veggie sandwich stuffer, but didn't eat it until I got home. I took a bite and got a mouth full of shredded chicken. I was emailed a survey from panera, so I filled it out with my complaint and requested that someone email me. A manager emailed me and offered to mail me some you pick two vouchers. I provided my address, a few weeks go by, and I received no response and no vouchers. They finally got back to me saying they had no vouchers and had to wait to get new ones before mailing them to me. I received them in the mail a few days later and all three had expired in 2024/2025. I emailed them telling them this and never received a response. I offered panera a chance to redeem themselves and instead, they made sure I'll never eat at their company again.

Taylor was so helpful!! She went above and beyond packing my order and made our Panera visit much more fun. My wisdom teeth were recently removed so I had a lot of weird customizations in my order and Taylor not only made sure it was packed correctly but that it was extra tasty too. She was so nice and friendly and brightened my day!! Thank you Taylor and Panera!
Good food and great place to catch up with friends. Clean and quiet enough for conversation at your table.
Staff were very nice!!!Had a little hiccup when ordering my soup, but the staff and manager when above and beyond!
I ran through the drive-through about an hour before close.  The food was great, and the gentleman at the window was courteous and pleasant.  I’ve always had a good experience at this location.
I entered the premises on 1/2/2026 and noticed how disgusting this facility was and left without ordering. Tables were extremely dirty and so were restrooms. Would not trust the kitchen

The broccoli 🥦 soup is delicious but be careful when using the kiosk to order food it took order and payment but we didnt receive our food  although management did make it he comped  out ticket and also gave us both a chocolate chip cookie

For as much as customers pay the sandwiches are paper thin now and they rarely get the order right. What a shame! Not worth eating at anymore. The par-baked breas is literally like eating cardboard. Biggest waste of money.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: Great and friendly staff
The service here is terrible; they are stingy with the sugar and everything else you want to take, so don't come to this place.

If you get a half sandwich, be prepared to get barely any ingredients on that thing. The whole sandwich is way better, I don’t know what’s going on but for amount of money spent, I except at least a sandwich and soup that will fill me up when it’s $15
Excelent Service.
Bathroom was disgusting, no hand soap, smelled like old urine.  Dining room floor had crumbs under just about every table. Restaurant could use a deep clean.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: Although the food here is good they NEVER EVER have medium size lids at the drink station.  No one EVER gets a large drink as there are ALWAYS large drinks lids.  And you can’t ever get anyone’s attention probably because they are understaffed.  Here’s an idea, only put medium drink lids at the drink station.  Or give me a lid when you give me a cup.  Take your pick.

This is a great place to eat at, take out, and drive thru, to get great food. I know it says Panera Bread,it's easy to think it's just a bread store, but it's not, it's a great food and snack restaurant. I'm not putting the menu on here you can see that at the Website. They have great food here, to eat on dates, or quick food to eat by yourself, or leave with, or go through the drive thru located at the back of the restaurant. Some people have different ideas of what should be on sandwiches or salads. If you want more lettuce or anything else, you need to tell the employees.
My wife ordered a French dip for me here and it's more like a piece of toast with a hardly any meat on it. Absolutely no pride in preparing their food. Zero stars if I could.
Food was good but expensive for the amount of food you get .

Trina is an ALLSTAR!!
Super nice and professional.
We forgot our pager at the register and she brought out our food for us saying “ I didn’t want your food to get cold”

Restaurant was not clean, area around drink station was nasty. Condiment bins were beyond dirty and sticky.  French dip sandwich was terrible and the French soup was nothing but brown salty water with onion chunks . Pantera Bread you have really gone down hill what happened to the once yummy clean place to eat. BTW your bathroom room was nasty.
The employers are  shallow either the orders and customers. They don’t pay attention at all at the orders.
Great sandwich and love the onion soup  !
Friendly, waited a little while, but it was worth the wait.

Went to drive thru today for autumn squash soup, half a chicken salad sandwich and an iced chai tea latte. The soup was good but the piece of bread that comes with the meal smelled and tasted like chemicals, and the chicken salad was completely inedible - I think it was old. The chai tea latte was mostly milk with a hint of flavor. I spent almost $19 and the only thing worth consuming was the soup.
Didn't eat. Met to accomplish a business transaction.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text:
2 for 1 soup & salad. New fall 2025 offering. Both were delicious!
Sort of dreary atmosphere.
Lovely young lady, pleasant in manner, took our order.
Prices on par with similar places.
Love Panera Bread! We eat there often.
The food is always good & fresh.

$22 bucks for a grill cheese cut in half and 2 small cups of tomatoe soup? Absolutely not.

And krafts singles on white bread? Cheap!
Croutons no longer made in house.

Over priced and NOT what is used to be.

Had a small business lunch there today. Atmosphere here a perfect for private, quiet conversations. The butternut squash winter soup was excellent as usual.
9/15/25 $18.81 That's my cost for PICK TWO:  ½ salad which only filled half of the small salad bowl, a  cup of salty chicken noodle soup, a cookie, and water. I left there hungry. Lesson learned.

I haven't visited a Panera in quite some time. This visit confirmed why I stayed away. I ordered a pick two. I was shocked when I placed my order and was told we don't have tomatoes.  No tomatoes at a restaurant? The salad had browned spots. Clearly it was old and should have been thrown out. Lastly the price of food at Panera borders on abusive for the quality of what they are serving.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Donna was absolutely the sweetest person! She was so awesome in helping me this morning! I felt like I was getting the Star treatment!
I love Panera there food and atmosphere is so great I always feel relax.
Quick and easy experience!

Food was great and so was the service. The atmosphere was good until I walked into the bathroom. If I was a manager there, I’d be letting corporate know it’s time for a bathroom update or upgrade. Bathrooms are a big deal to many customers.
One of my favorite places to get a healthy sandwich. The prices are a little on the high side
This Panera is always friendly fast and clean. We love taking the kids here, food is fresh and consistent.

Portion size has shrunk quite a bit. They are already quite a bit more expensive now coupled with the small portion size I just don’t see the value. Mccalisters deli beats them with portion size, price, and food quality. Panera has seemed to go downhill (unless it’s just this location?)
Very friendly and helpful staff.
The cinnamon crunch bagels used to be twice the size.....they shrunk......less for same money!

Food came super late . Manager super unhelpful , what else do you expect from Gastonia though . Tonya or Shanya if thats actually her name was extremely unhelpful and unprofessional.  The lady before her was very nice though . I would get a new manager and promote the other girl .
The staff was very friendly and professional. That was my first time there. No complaints

The truth is Panera Bread never made it back from the pandemic.
I went to the Gastonia, NC location last Friday. The selection in side is maybe 10% of what use to be out in the ordering area behind glass. Very few selections of bread and pastries. And there might have been 2 tables being used. I remember going in there and NO tables empty.  If you want the people tp come back the selection needs to be like it was before. Advertise to let people know you are back on top. Or close your doors.

We ordered a salad and half of a BLT. The bread and bacon must have been sitting out for a long time! Both were as hard as a brick!  So disappointed! I called the manager Michael to let him know how bad it was!

Wish I could leave a good review, however it seems the employees cannot get the orders right to save their life. i have been multiple times with a simple order of a plain turkey and cheese sandwich toasted. Every time they get it wrong, whether with vegetables, not toasted, or just wrong item altogether. When you tell them it is wrong they treat you like the bad person. I do enjoy their food when it is correct, which is rarely. For the price I would expect better service overall. I never like to leave bad reviews, but this has been the case many times and I would like to share my experience.

This was one of the worst experiences I’ve had at Panera Bread. Not only was our order late, but when I finally opened my meal, I found a rotten apple included. Yes — soft, brown, mushy, and clearly spoiled. It’s absolutely unacceptable to serve food in that condition. For a company that prides itself on fresh ingredients, this was a complete failure. If this is the level of quality and service Panera is offering now, I’ll be taking my business elsewhere.
I just ordered Mediterranean salad whole one for $15 When I open it it’s not even half of it salad. They charge us $15for a couple pieces of lettuce.
We love it....food is excellent,  service is awesome and even if you meet friends, no waitress is coming and interrupting the conversation.....really relaxing...

The Croque Monsieur was fantastic- wish they’d keep it on the menu all the time!
Can’t go wrong with the white cheddar Mac- my kiddo loves the bread bowl with Mac, and it comes with a side.
The frozen strawberry lemonade was tasty!

I ordered the ciabatta cheesesteak.  Sooooooo disappointed.  No peppers, no cheese, no onion.  I spoke to a manager, Sonya, who admitted that she has gotten at least 50 calls reporting same issue.  I do not know if it was for the sandwich or for other food that was ordered at the drive-through across the board.

While I was offered a credit, that did not help us because we were looking forward to lunch and we were all disgusted by what we got. We fed it to the dogs and are heading to McDonald’s.  Sad sad sad.  I hope they allow me to post pictures further on down this review.

I will never go to Panera again and leave without checking what my sandwich looks like.

Oh, and the manager justified this by saying that the workers were young. When I was young, I worked and I worked well and nobody complained about my work. This excuse riled me the most.
Great selection of small bites

Let's get into this review!
Lunch date.

Entrée #1
1/2 tuna sandwich with broccoli cheddar soup

Entrée #2
1/2 walnut cranberry chicken salad sandwich and creamy tomato soup

Service was great!
Food tastwd great!
The outdoor seating was nice on a sunny breezy day.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: It seems like every time I visit this location they can't seem to get orders correct. Missing food, and horrible service.
Very good service and online app to place the orders

Today I ordered the Frommage, basically a glorified grilled cheese. It was burned to the point of being inedible. The tea and lemonade dispensers were almost completely empty, the floor was sticky and gross, and the staff prepped my “to go” order on a plate as though I were dining in. It’s sad to see how badly this place has gone downhill.

Appears Panera has decided to reduce the amount of meat and eggs you actually get on your entrees. Soufflé has turned into a pastry with the essence of egg. Chicken sandwiches are seemingly half of the quantity advertised. 43 grams of protein is false advertisement. See picture. Wish I had pictures of the other 3 entrees with the same problems. Hate to see it, Panera.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: Great food as always
The food is always very good and the staff is friendly and accommodating.
Great coffee and delicious pastries.  Excellent customer service.
A really good variety of food with quick and polite service.
Lunch was great! Good fresh and delicious!
Nice
Friendly staff , great food, reasonable prices
Great service
First time doing a pick up order, staff was friendly and order was ready

If you don’t want to deal with customers, maybe don’t work in customer service. I arrived at 6:05 AM, just after they opened, and knocked on the door. Donna saw me and straight-up ignored me. When I finally got inside, she was rude and defensive like I was the problem. Thankfully, the manager was professional and took half off my meal, but Donna’s attitude was unacceptable. Do better.

The employees are always excellent! They’ve got a great staff here. But whoever makes the decisions for what gets baked, quantities available, etc. really needs to rethink what they’re doing. They are ALWAYS out of bagels! It’s (supposedly) a bread shop! If you don’t want an Asiago cheese bagel (which is always massively available due to them also having lunch and dinner Asiago bagel sandwiches) you’re out of luck most times! I come twice a week at 9:30 am and the bagel bins are always empty. It didn’t used to be like this years ago. What happened?

The Panera Bread in Gastonia has always been a reliable, friendly, and convenient location for me to grab food and work in a comfortable setting. I recommend it and I appreciate the workers that help to make it a great place for eating, socializing, and working with plenty of natural light and great seating options.

I usually get the toasted Italiano, great sandwich.  Today I decided on the chicken bacon ranch, not bad, but NOT FILLING!!! extremely small sandwich for the price, definitely NOT WORTH IT!!!
$13 for the sandwich a bag of chips and a sweet tea!!! STILL HUNGRY!!!
Next time I'll go to Burger King!!!
Food was fine. Service inconsistent.
Thank you guys!! Melissa H is great, she’s super nice and very helpful
Nice atmosphere, very comfortable seating.  Great coffee ☕️
Loved chicken noodle soup especially on a cold winter day.

The restroom was so dirty. There are 3 stalls. 2 were out of toilet paper & one was stopped up. I needed the handicap stall, but there was no paper. The changing table was down with paper all over it. The walls & floor were horrible!!! There were only 4 customers in the restaurant.
Food slaps, lazy lady at the window don’t ever want to sweeten my tea tho 👎🏼
A lot of choices on the menu to choose from and the prices are reasonable.

I cannot recommend Panera Bread anymore. Their pricing is insane for what you get. The quality is not what it used to be.  Sadly, This is the last time we will he having Panera.

Soup - 3/5
Grilled Cheese - 1/5
All other sandwiches - 3/5
Parking - 2/5
Cleanliness - 1/5
Available Seating - 2/5
Pricing - 0/5

Very customer friendly and awesome staff! Provide nothing but an amazing experience from every end of the table! Absolutely Loved it! Period point blank! Recommended to anyone that love's a good family time for any time of day.
Great food.

I ordered a chicken and noodle soup 1-19-2025 and only5 pieces of carrot!! Who in their right mind does that!!! I thought Panera was supposed to be this top of the line place to go but I guessed I was wrong.

Taylor is the best!!!! She’s always super sweet and extremely helpful!! Sometimes I order online for pickup and sometimes I order for delivery. If I ever have an issue Taylor helps me every time and ensures I get my food!!! Highly recommend!!!
Waited over 30 minutes for an online order to never come. Shit communication. They kept saying “yours is next” never came. Had to ask for a refund. Embarrassing customer service

I ordered through doordash and my order included a kitchen sink cookie. They must have ran out bc I didnt have the cookie but they replaced it with more than enough sweets/food to make up for it. After having several bad experiences with missing items from other places, it was nice to be treated so well. Great job whoever decided to make up for the missing item.
Always a winner on taste and variety. They could use some customer service tips.
They have great food. You can't go wrong.
the food was good
Great Panera. Easy and quick orders/ pick ups.
Great pumpking soup
Food was excellent.  Service was good and fast.

Staff is nice. My issue is after getting food last night I woke up this morning at 5:00am throwing up the food I ate. I now have food poising and it scares me what type of cleaning protocols yall follow to prevent these things from happening. I don’t know if I’ll return anymore.
Soup sandwich was delicious

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Very elegant setting!
On Tuesday, they had a good special for Bagel. The hostess at the cashier desk was very friendly, she made my day!! Thank you !
Friendly staff, had the chicken noodle soup which was good, Buffalo chicken sub was also good, chicken salad sandwich was just ok, (in my opinion the bread to c/chicken salad ratio didn't match)
Simone was very nice and had great suggestions for my first time eating here.
Pretty good little bit expensive/// visited on 09/30/24 out of bread? Huh bakery? Huh?
It's just 🍞
There was a booger on the wall. My salad had no dressing. 2 bites of macaroni in the bread bowl

This Panera in Gastonia has the absolute nicest staff! Caring, welcoming, friendly. The tables are almost always clean. Trash changed out. Dish area cleaned up. Food is always good and quick. Hardly ever out of any items (like a lot of other restaurants). If there is anything I could venture to say negatively, it is occasionally the coffee area is messy and in need of a refill. When I do mention that area lacking attention,  they quickly address the issue and it's typically after the breakfast or lunch rush.

Drop by!
Wonderful drive thru experience as I was hungry and driving around and pulled in.
The cars moved fast and i only saw one very nice and efficient lady and my order was customized and perfect!
Using the app and drive thru is quick. Always friendly service

One of the better Paneras I’ve been to and I’ve visited these places up and down the east coast.    My only problem (and every location suffers from this). They are always out of something. Cucumbers,  avocado, hummus, tomato, BREAD….   I understand they are trying to balance the bottom line with food spoilage.  But it sucks when a couple missing items ruins what you want to order.    Otherwise this location is great. 👍
Just got our free Sip Drinks
Almost 8 dollars for a cup of oatmeal that taste like I got it from the hospital cafeteria. So insanely bland how are they selling this

Such a great Panera Bread ! We came in with the Grandkids. Everyone working this late shift tonight was terrific, from placing our order  to preparing food for us all with a happy face!  Great Experience!

Todos lo platillos lucen deliciosos. Yo  probé un sandwich de pechuga de pollo con tocino y adherezo de chipotlemuy rico y una sopa de pollo con nodles en pasta. Quedé satisfecho y con un gran sabor de boca

Portions were very small. I had a chicken sandwich, and it had two small chicken pieces (chopped) on it. The sandwich was thrown together. I took it apart and re-assembled it before being able to it eat it. Didn't even bother with the chicken. I just ate those two small bites while assembling the sandwich. The Blueberry, Lavender Lemonade was awesome though! 🙂
Love the sandwiches!
The new ciabatta/steak sandwich had no peppers, tiny bit onion, a little cheese and a little steak. And they had no napkins! I won't go back and can't recommend it.

Panera food is generally great so don't let this deter you if you're concerned about quality. The lack of stars for this location is specific to the wait time. Drive thru, order ahead, doesn't really seem to matter - It always takes a little bit of extra time past what is expected. Understandably this could be just a time of day issue, or they’re understaffed due to the pandemic, but at that point I would think maybe you turn off order ahead for that location? Other companies use this model and it does work.
Always love their bagels.
Always fresh and delicious!
If you are seeking healthy options at night, after 8pm, skip this location. They were out of at least 1 item on most sandwiches. Mac and cheese was cold. Worst $15 spent in a long time.

The food purchased looked NOTHING like the food advertised. We had to open our bread to figure out what sandwiches was what. Why present these full looking sandwiches to give a customer 1/4 of what’s in the picture..?!?! Waste of money!!

Really busy during lunch hour, pricey $34 for lunch, WHY? And the cashier decides to pick up my brownie with her dirty gloves she was wearing to woek.yhw register.  Had to complain to manager and he made it right immediately and gave me a free desert.  Will I return, probably not
Can be a bit pricey
Muy buen lugar para reuniones, buen ambiente y servicio rápido.
Fist and last time there. Pics on menu are not what you get. A sub from Harris Teeter is a better value at twice the size and approximately 35% less expensive. Pic of steak sandwich.
I'm from New Jersey. Need my bagels

We ordered ahead through the app and picked up in the drive thru. They forgot my husband’s sandwich in his You Pick Two. When we got home and discovered the error, we tried to call to speak to a manager, but nobody answered.

I submitted a complaint online and hope customer service will respond and credit us the missing item.

Friendly service. Ordered a drink from the sip club and it said it was ready then disappeared on menu board but drink never showed up. It was the first time I had ordered here and they said you get the amount the ice you give the cup with your Charger choice. Other locations have drink waiting when you arrive

Update: 2/8. Today a new one for the record books. Panera was out of bagels at 1030. The manager said they make what they forecast and thats it!
This place is horrible. They do commissary style now. Never have sweets after 2pm! What we got is all we got mentality. Sell out of everything. Place is dirty and staff is rude!
I liked the turkey chili soup, the pepperoni flatbread pizza was just ok not much better then a frozen grocery store pizza.
I had the Mediterranean bowl,  and the rice looked uncooked/ cold. I told one of the employee and they made me another one that was good. Thank you!
Ordered my $10 takeout salad with missing ingredients. No black beans or corn. Disappointed. I was a regular customer.

Always a great place with very good food.  Lots of foot traffic makes atmosphere a little loud.  A good place at certain times of the day to take your laptop and get some work done while sipping coffee.  The cashier Donna is the friendliest person on staff.  The rest of the staff could learn from her what customer service means.
All was well.  I just had to grab a couple of gift cards

We had not been to Panera in several years but we were given a gift card and we are so glad that it got us back into the restaurant. They continue to have a great sandwich/salad/soup menu, and their pastries are excellent. The service at the register wasn't great, but the food was done quickly.
Even when the app was doing crazy things, the manager took care of me...great customer service
Never had a bad experience at this location (knock on wood). I ordered pick up on the app,  drive thru. Super fast and friendly employee at the window. I ordered the Mediterranean Veggie. So yummy 😋

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: The bread is always so hard that I can’t eat it without soup or something to dip it in
Dude at the counter was nice, and was able to answer my question. Place was packed, a bit busy for my taste. They got my order right, and it was great.
The Frontega Chicken sandwich and kitchen sink cookie put me right where I needed to be !!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Food so good it's almost worth having a heart attack
When you order a bowl and a cup of soup and they serve a cup amount on the bowl...
Kinda dirty but food was good

Live this place. I go for bagels every Sunday for my team. 13 bagels and 2 pints of cream cheese is a bargain. The lady working the register is one of the most pleasant people I have ever encountered. If I didn't work so far from gastonia I would absolutely try to poach her for my restaurant.  Highly recommended
Food was good service was okay.
Kindly associate and yumi yumi food.

I like the Napa almond chicken salad at Panera, but this particular location gives tiny portions. I won't be ordering it here again. I got approximately 3 tablespoons on chicken salad on my half sandwich today. In Huntersville last week, I got a nice amount and went and told the kitchen how much I appreciated it. Today I am leaving hungry.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Many options at reasonable prices,  excellent staff. One of our go to places
The food is excellent. The service is great too. Only place in town that says thank you when you tip them.

Have not been to Panera Bread in a few years. I used to love the Asiago Beef sandwich. Today's lunch with my wife was ok. I mean my wife was great, the lunch was just ok. We both had the lunch special. BBQ chicken sandwich with creamy tomato soup. The sandwich was good. The soup tasted like spaghetti O's. The ham and cheese sandwich was good also but the chicken noodle soup had an odd clam taste.
Their bread no longer taste fresh.
Panera's in Gastonia is WONDERFUL!  We love Donna! She is a great asset to the team! The food is delicious and the charged lemonades are next level!

I bounce around coffee shops from Charlotte to Kings Mountain everyday, and none of them compare to the service I get at this Panera! I can always guarantee to walk in and be welcomed with a bright and GENUINE smile from Miss Donna!!

I am big on hospitality and service, and Miss Donna truly cares about each and every person that walks through the door! She keeps me coming back every week and I hope she can make your day like she makes mine!!

THANK YOU MISS DONNA <3
They need more than one person up front. Took forever to just get a bagel.

Wilted black edged & slimy inedible lettuce, pink chicken & 4 wonton pieces on my Asian salad. Never had this experience with Panera Bread before. As my husband was picking up his order, he was pretty much ignored by the employees, who were too busy on their phones & when he asked for help, they acted as if he was bothering them &  mearly pointed at a vicinity, in the direction in order to get our order. I am recovering from a knee surgery and this was the one meal I asked for. However, to receive the worst service and disrespect upon pick up & pay $50 for this experience & lack of fresh food is unreal. People don't have money to throw away for this and certainly failed service & rotten food. This is the 2nd time at this Panera, never again.
The food is OK. The food is over priced. Panera really needs to work on customer service and friendliness at the counter. When you walk up and the clerk just stares you. Pretty sad.
Me and my best friend went for lunch. We each had 1/2 sandwich and soup. I got French Onion soup and turkey, bacon with avocado....it was LOVELY!!!!

Fast, friendly service, which contrasted from my last visit. Will go back again to hopes of more good service. Waiting for the return of turkey chili.

**Update: 9/29/23: Turkey Chili is back! Great service. Fresh bread and Papaya Green Tea! Mmmmm.
Good location. We ordered breakfast through the app traveling. It was done as soon as we arrived. We ordered just about 5 minutes before.
A nice place for a good meal and to spend quality time with friends

This place has turned into a disaster. Not only do they charge extremely high prices for such small quantities. They’ve gone away with pagers for dine in, so there’s endless people always gathered waiting to snag food. Pain of a system
They never have the bagel I want no matter the time. Plus,now that they stopped serving the kind of eggs I prefer I haven't been much.
Great menu. Lots of yummy food!

While the food we ordered was yummy the lady at the register was so not friendly at all no smile no welcometo Panera no thank you.  Asked about what dressings they had you would have thought I asked her for the unspeakable. Asked her if she ever tried a particular dressing just a dry no. Then said it so fast apple or chips we thought she said apple chips. Then I said apple chips going to give me a look said huh. I said apple chips she said no its apple OR chips. It's been so long since I ate there so unsure of menu and hopefully if I go back I will get another lady at register.
The staff here has always been really friendly and good service.
Confusing menu. Staff were good in explaining it.  Still ordered incorrectly.
Very dirty.  Blanket of dust on the ceiling filter.  Food smeared on the seat back and around and between the cushions.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Consistently great food, fast and friendly service.
Nice and quiet. Also sign up for the rewards club for 2 months. Cancel any time and get free drinks.

This place is not that cheap for their food to be so bad. I always think twice about spending my money on them. It's not just this location it's Panera bread. In general, I have gone to a different location, and it's always the same thing they mess up my order or something is missing, or overall, it's just bad. People just don't want to work or maybe just don't like their jobs either way. You should try to do your best because you still get paid for it. Anyways last night I ordered from them. And apparently, the avocado still had the skin on it. Also was missing sauce on it, and it was cold, and chicken was nasty, like if it was old.

I have sip club so I frequent lots of Panera. I also travel a lot so I've seen the best and the worst Panera. This on is disgusting by the drink stations it reeks like vomit. However I don't think it's actually vomit but mold. The surrounding area is always wet and if you look at the bottom of the cabinet they look rotten. I think they need to investigate because this is probably causing health issues. Especially prolonged exposure.
Quick service

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text:
Is my favorite restaurant.
Delicious food , nice employees,
Very clean place .  I love it
Thank you so much

Cleanliness is a consistent issue at this location, and either it’s asinine for a quick service restaurant to even have a drive through or the service here is just not great. Every time I have used this drive thru the wait has been too long for the lack of other cars, if you Must stop here do yourself a favor and order for pickup ahead of time.
Always amazing, but be cautious that all Paneras run out of ingredients at some point.
This place is BAD, and has drastically went downhill in recent years! The food is not fresh, and every time I order to go or pick up, the order is wrong and missing items!
This location in gastonia poor service food  was below average
Food too salty, service not people friendly :-(
Regular Panera Bread.

I love that they are doing mobile order pickups through the drive thru now! I get my free drink (I'm a Sip Club member) every morning and when no one else is in line, it only takes about 30 seconds and I'm back on my way! SOOOO convenient! The staff is always friendly and quick to help as well!
Great warm grain bowl & grilled veggies sandwich along with chai tea latte. Had a good pizza flatbread

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: The Green Goddess Baguette is so delicious!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: It feels like Panera is still in Covid mode. Picking things up is smooth and seamless but I ordered a drink while waiting for my food. There were no cups, no one to ask for a cup, no lemons...just felt very bare bones.
Friendliest staff and great food, love the salads and soups

Ordered delivery here (Uber Eats) and 1/4 of the items ordered were not delivered. When I asked for a refund (for the items I did t get), I was shut down. Not ordering here again, ever. Fool me once… Beware, people! 👎🏼🚫
The staff at this restaurant is extremely nice and helpful. However, there was an issue with getting the correct order the first time for multiple orders. The food was okay.

Don't go here if you had tree nut allergies or food sensitivities. There is crosscontamination a plenty. I'll stopped by here twice for my daughter on the way to school and she had an allergic response to her food/drink both times. She has never had this experience at other panera's and we won't be coming back. Not sure what happening in the back in but won't be trying it out to see what happens again. Very disappointing.
My sandwich had too much spicy mustard. Why do they still not have tomatoes for sandwiches?  My salad was great for dinner.
Drive thru wait was long and my order was wrong.  No time to fix. Disappointed.

The curbside pick up is absolutely awful. The last few times I have used it the item I ordered is a item that sits in the window up front so I typically get a quick message within 2-5min saying my order is ready which would make sense. I normally have my young children with me, hence using curbside pickup. It literally takes me waiting 10-15min afer receiving the email saying it's ready- including me calling and being put on hold before I can get anyone to bring it out. What is the point of putting in the parking spot location in the app if I have to call anyways?  If your too busy to walk out orders, then don't offer curbside pickup.
Always good choices and service.

My family of four came in for dinner tonight and while we were looking at the pastry’s the girl at the register made a rude comment calling us fat for looking at the desserts. We hear her say that and turned around and left. Terrible costumer service.
It’s Panera bread. 🤷🏼‍♂️
28$ gets you a tiny sandwich, small Mac, and an 8oz smoothie. My bag weighed less than a pound. Feels bad. Feeling robbed.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Food is almost always amazing, but the drive through is iffy with people running it. I've waited for 10 minutes with no one coming to the drive through window in the morning even though they're open. Just be aware of that and plan accordingly.
Great onion soup and salad
Always delicious
Always a good place to eat 😋
Used the website to order pickup. Food was ready in 10 minutes and was exactly what I ordered.
Excellent
Great food although I got the full Tuna Sandwich it came out with 2 sandwiches.  If it was explained that half a sandwich was actually one whole sandwich  I would have got the half.
I go there for the soup.
Food is good, but service is lacking.  Drive thru is rarely open.  Order to food takes 10 minutes for a simple order.
Fantastic, massive baguette could easily be cut in half and shared.

Food decent. Cleanliness is atrocious! Floors disgusting, bathroom looks like no one has cleaned it in months. If your store is this filthy, I don’t want to even think about what the kitchen looks like.
Delicious sandwich

Today, we had the pleasure to meet Taylor Kent the assistant general manager at the Gastonia Panera Bread location. Taylor is 24 years old with a vibrant personality and is a dynamic manager. She is on top of her game at this young age, a very mature young person. The management team should be so proud that she is on the front lines because she has the personality and vision to go to the next level. We are so happy to have met Taylor, and wish her all the best as she continues to develop into the next stage in her career. Thank you, Taylor! Dewey and Jane Moses
The food was good. Typical Panera quality. The service was excellent!
Awesome
Go try their soups this winter. It’s amazing

I honestly don't know how our Panera is still open, if I could give it 0 stars I would. Since covid this restaurant has gone down hill. We attempted to eat there twice in one week and both times they were out of what we wanted to order. This use to be one of our favorite restaurants, but over the past few months our experience has not been favorable. If this location closed it would not surprise me, will not going back anytime soon. Grateful their soup is sold at the grocery store.
Good food. A little slow but expected.
This place is filthy, smell dirty and looks unsanitary. Carpet is disgusting, most employees hate their job and they have bad attitude. I hope they start cleaning and have better customer service

The staff here are always rude and I found hair in my salad don’t think I’ll
Ever eat at the Gastonia location till they fix management and learn how to wear hair nets and more clean around there food !
Not again. Cost vs quality.. no.
I hope the food is good because $13 for a chicken sandwich that's stupid but whatever

Website shows that they are supposed to be open at 6 am Mon-Thurs. Now I understand if people call out and what not but it should the managers job to put a sign on the drive thru or at least man the headset of the drive thru to let customers know they won’t be serving drive thru. Instead of having someone wait almost 10 mins with no one in line. That’s just poor customer service and leadership

Music way too loud in lobby to hold a conversation. 3 employees were in the lobby complaining and playing loud music. 2 were on break and were drowning out the conversation my client and I were having. Probably my last visit.
I had dental work done and needed something soft and warm to eat.  Their Mac and Cheese was perfect.  Nice and creamy.

What a rip off! Ordered a turkey sandwich on "white wheat", whatever that is. Came with two thin slices of turkey, tons of mayo, which I didn't want, on two slices of stale bread. The meal, which included about a half cup of soup was $15. Never again!
Great salads & fresh bread
Order messed up 2 times will try again been back food is amazing the young woman made sure all the food was rite taste awesome
Dirty and seemed under-staffed.

Went there for lunch today. Very disappointed in the amount of meat on my steak and cheese sandwich it look like a tiny slice with cheese and just a little bit of onions. You're not getting what you're paying for and the prices have gone up. I paid close to $25 for this measly sandwich which was mostly bread a tiny little thing of mac and cheese and a drink. I got the chips and a little Bagel it with it for free. But it still was not worth $25. I don't know what's going on?
Food is always the same very good

Ordered curbside, got a message saying someone is on the way out with your order and know one shows up. I go inside to see what the problem is, all the employees inside talking while my food is sitting on the counter getting cold. Umm if your not actually gonna honor the curbside option then you need to take it down!!

40 bucks for soup and no drinks then they get it all types of wrong .

I won’t be back over priced.
Sams club broccoli, and cheddar soup is better than Panera by far
Customer service very slow.I ordered coffe it take 30 min.

The customer service was pretty good. They were trying and I was patient, that’s all I’m going to say about that. I was turned off by the lack of cleanliness in the store. It seemed like everything was sticky the floor, the coffee area including milk disposers(I barely wanted to touch it.), the tables and doors etc. This restaurant needs a remodel or at the least a deep cleaning. This made the dining experience unsettling for me.
This store never have hot coffee. The coffee is always luke warm. The staff is never friendly, it's like they are forced to be at work. Send a secret shopper in this store..
Quick healthier food option in the area.
Melissa was great! Would definitely recommend coming to this location!

I placed an order online. When I got up to the order board, I asked to add two of the .99 brownies to my order. I was rudely told that I could not do that! I asked why, and she replied, "because we don't." This is RIDICULOUS. AND this is the last time I will EVER spend a penny at Panera!

I haven’t been to this store for lunch in ages because they kept messing up the orders. Today I thought, “today is a nice day for soup & salad”. Thought I’d give it a try. They switched my order with another & gave me food I’m allergic to. Then, when I called they said they’d be happy to get me the right food if I just drove back over… I don’t know about you, but I don’t have an endless lunch period to make multiple trips to the restaurant.
I’m done. I won’t be back.
Et Tu, Panera?
Good grilled cheese sandwich, but I would love to see some GF options on the menu.
My plate was awesome for my first time. Will be back.

They are constantly running out of items from the bakery and other types of food. If I could give 0 stars, I would. I could I understand if this happened once in a while. Yet this has been consistent for the last 6 months. What is the point of being a bakery when you are out of half your bread supply by 8:30 am.

reviews_data.review_text:
Good food. Great service.

4.5 stars

The staff are amazing, patient and polite, it is always clean, a very calm and relax atmosphere. The food is great, I got the Spicy chicken Fiesta sandwich with a cherry lime drink, since my birthday was yesterday I got a free pastry of my choice
Drive thru, sausage breakfast sandwich to share with my pup.  We both enjoyed it.

I ordered through Uber Eats. Not feeling well I ordered chicken soup and a banana. The banana was black and mushy and small for the price. I tried to call to let them know and they hung up on me. I called back with no answer. Unimpressed

Food tastes great, but Panera has the biggest discrepancy between the pictures of the food and what you actually receive.
You enter your order yourself, and pick up your food at the window, so there isn't any service. Toilets are gross.
It's good food, but you can get as good or better sandwiches elsewhere at the same price or better, and not feel like you are getting ripped off.

I ordered online the doordash person super kind and willing to go back to store for me. I got a abysmal sandwich that tasted old stale ships and they forgot my drink I spent around $16-$18 before delivery this place is not worth it go to subway or anywhere else. 1 star

If you are excited to eat your favorite food from Panera, find another location. I promise you they don’t have what you need in stock. I have made this repeat mistake 3 times now unfortunately. The first trip, they didn’t have mac and cheese. Second trip, they didn’t have BREAD!? Panera bread straight up didn’t have bread… This time they didn’t have tomato slices for sandwiches. Management is completely and utterly failing this panera team by not equipping them with the resources they need to succeed.

This is also the grossest bathroom I have ever seen for a Panera. Most gas station bathrooms are cleaner than this place. It’s absolutely repulsive and I will never return here again.
Love their bagels but I wish they had at least one more cream cheese option like veggie for the cheesy bagels. Service is great here and prices are like other places. I also love their coffee.
Always good service, food is fresh and delicious. I love all the menu choices of sandwiches, soups, pastas and pastries. I can never decide on one thing, so the Pick 2 is a great way to go!

review_questions.Vegetarian offerings: Large vegetarian selection, Clearly labeled vegetarian dishes

reviews_data.review_text: I LOVE the breakfast souffles, especially the cheese one. I always get  a couple of extras for home.
There was some issues ordering on the tablets.  I order from a staff member. It was quick and easy.
Amazing worker , She was fast and efficient. I think her name was Raja ...I'm not certain but she was great .

This Panera is so hit or miss. You never know what type of quality or customer service you’ll get. Today both were lacking. I ordered the chicken chipotle avocado melt and the bread was burnt and there was hardly anything but chicken on the sandwich.

Mellissa helped me at the Gastonia Panera location. She was very friendly, helpful and ensured everything I got through the drive-through was correct. She double checked that I got my chips andy large drink and everything was received as ordered. She was a friendly person to speak with and does a great job!

I got an assortment of pastries and they were good as usual. However, they were subpar on the coffee. I wanted dark roast but it was empty. The spot for medium roast didn't even have a pot in place and the only other option was caffeine-free. The lady that checked me out offered to brew a fresh pot and give me a cup. I sat down and waited. It didn't take but 2 or 3 minutes and she came out with a cup. But it was only lukewarm. 🥴
Shrinkflation has hit this place hard...got a full size greek salad that was SO skimpy and then they had the audacity to leave the romaine butt in there.
Yummy

$7.00 chicken avocado egg sandwich was on a tiny piece of bread. Half of the sandwich has absolutely no chicken on it. I normally don't do reviews, but Panera's portions have changed to very small in the last few years. It's really disappointing to eat there anymore. My last meal there was a very small focaccia chicken sandwich, and a bowl of soup from a bag, and it was $22.00.  woman was very nice at the register.
kayla was supper sweet and helped me pick the broccoli cheddar it’s so delicious
Staff RUSH you. There were no cars behind me so huffing and groaning “ready when you are” was ridiculous
Food came early and they gave me a mini cookie and brownie for free. Usually get food here but this was really cute and I wanted to show me appreciation
Always messing up my online orders.
Love the broccoli cheese soup

I ordered here a few weeks ago and am only posting this now because I'd been emailing a manager from panera and was waiting to see how things ended before writing this.

I'm a vegetarian and ordered the veggie sandwich stuffer, but didn't eat it until I got home. I took a bite and got a mouth full of shredded chicken. I was emailed a survey from panera, so I filled it out with my complaint and requested that someone email me. A manager emailed me and offered to mail me some you pick two vouchers. I provided my address, a few weeks go by, and I received no response and no vouchers. They finally got back to me saying they had no vouchers and had to wait to get new ones before mailing them to me. I received them in the mail a few days later and all three had expired in 2024/2025. I emailed them telling them this and never received a response. I offered panera a chance to redeem themselves and instead, they made sure I'll never eat at their company again.

Taylor was so helpful!! She went above and beyond packing my order and made our Panera visit much more fun. My wisdom teeth were recently removed so I had a lot of weird customizations in my order and Taylor not only made sure it was packed correctly but that it was extra tasty too. She was so nice and friendly and brightened my day!! Thank you Taylor and Panera!
Good food and great place to catch up with friends. Clean and quiet enough for conversation at your table.
Staff were very nice!!!Had a little hiccup when ordering my soup, but the staff and manager when above and beyond!
I ran through the drive-through about an hour before close.  The food was great, and the gentleman at the window was courteous and pleasant.  I’ve always had a good experience at this location.
I entered the premises on 1/2/2026 and noticed how disgusting this facility was and left without ordering. Tables were extremely dirty and so were restrooms. Would not trust the kitchen

The broccoli 🥦 soup is delicious but be careful when using the kiosk to order food it took order and payment but we didnt receive our food  although management did make it he comped  out ticket and also gave us both a chocolate chip cookie

For as much as customers pay the sandwiches are paper thin now and they rarely get the order right. What a shame! Not worth eating at anymore. The par-baked breas is literally like eating cardboard. Biggest waste of money.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: Great and friendly staff
The service here is terrible; they are stingy with the sugar and everything else you want to take, so don't come to this place.

If you get a half sandwich, be prepared to get barely any ingredients on that thing. The whole sandwich is way better, I don’t know what’s going on but for amount of money spent, I except at least a sandwich and soup that will fill me up when it’s $15
Excelent Service.
Bathroom was disgusting, no hand soap, smelled like old urine.  Dining room floor had crumbs under just about every table. Restaurant could use a deep clean.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: Although the food here is good they NEVER EVER have medium size lids at the drink station.  No one EVER gets a large drink as there are ALWAYS large drinks lids.  And you can’t ever get anyone’s attention probably because they are understaffed.  Here’s an idea, only put medium drink lids at the drink station.  Or give me a lid when you give me a cup.  Take your pick.

This is a great place to eat at, take out, and drive thru, to get great food. I know it says Panera Bread,it's easy to think it's just a bread store, but it's not, it's a great food and snack restaurant. I'm not putting the menu on here you can see that at the Website. They have great food here, to eat on dates, or quick food to eat by yourself, or leave with, or go through the drive thru located at the back of the restaurant. Some people have different ideas of what should be on sandwiches or salads. If you want more lettuce or anything else, you need to tell the employees.
My wife ordered a French dip for me here and it's more like a piece of toast with a hardly any meat on it. Absolutely no pride in preparing their food. Zero stars if I could.
Food was good but expensive for the amount of food you get .

Trina is an ALLSTAR!!
Super nice and professional.
We forgot our pager at the register and she brought out our food for us saying “ I didn’t want your food to get cold”

Restaurant was not clean, area around drink station was nasty. Condiment bins were beyond dirty and sticky.  French dip sandwich was terrible and the French soup was nothing but brown salty water with onion chunks . Pantera Bread you have really gone down hill what happened to the once yummy clean place to eat. BTW your bathroom room was nasty.
The employers are  shallow either the orders and customers. They don’t pay attention at all at the orders.
Great sandwich and love the onion soup  !
Friendly, waited a little while, but it was worth the wait.

Went to drive thru today for autumn squash soup, half a chicken salad sandwich and an iced chai tea latte. The soup was good but the piece of bread that comes with the meal smelled and tasted like chemicals, and the chicken salad was completely inedible - I think it was old. The chai tea latte was mostly milk with a hint of flavor. I spent almost $19 and the only thing worth consuming was the soup.
Didn't eat. Met to accomplish a business transaction.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text:
2 for 1 soup & salad. New fall 2025 offering. Both were delicious!
Sort of dreary atmosphere.
Lovely young lady, pleasant in manner, took our order.
Prices on par with similar places.
Love Panera Bread! We eat there often.
The food is always good & fresh.

$22 bucks for a grill cheese cut in half and 2 small cups of tomatoe soup? Absolutely not.

And krafts singles on white bread? Cheap!
Croutons no longer made in house.

Over priced and NOT what is used to be.

Had a small business lunch there today. Atmosphere here a perfect for private, quiet conversations. The butternut squash winter soup was excellent as usual.
9/15/25 $18.81 That's my cost for PICK TWO:  ½ salad which only filled half of the small salad bowl, a  cup of salty chicken noodle soup, a cookie, and water. I left there hungry. Lesson learned.

I haven't visited a Panera in quite some time. This visit confirmed why I stayed away. I ordered a pick two. I was shocked when I placed my order and was told we don't have tomatoes.  No tomatoes at a restaurant? The salad had browned spots. Clearly it was old and should have been thrown out. Lastly the price of food at Panera borders on abusive for the quality of what they are serving.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Bakery, Broccoli Cheddar Soup in a Bread Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: Donna was absolutely the sweetest person! She was so awesome in helping me this morning! I felt like I was getting the Star treatment!
I love Panera there food and atmosphere is so great I always feel relax.
Quick and easy experience!

Food was great and so was the service. The atmosphere was good until I walked into the bathroom. If I was a manager there, I’d be letting corporate know it’s time for a bathroom update or upgrade. Bathrooms are a big deal to many customers.
One of my favorite places to get a healthy sandwich. The prices are a little on the high side
This Panera is always friendly fast and clean. We love taking the kids here, food is fresh and consistent.

Portion size has shrunk quite a bit. They are already quite a bit more expensive now coupled with the small portion size I just don’t see the value. Mccalisters deli beats them with portion size, price, and food quality. Panera has seemed to go downhill (unless it’s just this location?)
Very friendly and helpful staff.
The cinnamon crunch bagels used to be twice the size.....they shrunk......less for same money!

Food came super late . Manager super unhelpful , what else do you expect from Gastonia though . Tonya or Shanya if thats actually her name was extremely unhelpful and unprofessional.  The lady before her was very nice though . I would get a new manager and promote the other girl .
The staff was very friendly and professional. That was my first time there. No complaints

The truth is Panera Bread never made it back from the pandemic.
I went to the Gastonia, NC location last Friday. The selection in side is maybe 10% of what use to be out in the ordering area behind glass. Very few selections of bread and pastries. And there might have been 2 tables being used. I remember going in there and NO tables empty.  If you want the people tp come back the selection needs to be like it was before. Advertise to let people know you are back on top. Or close your doors.

We ordered a salad and half of a BLT. The bread and bacon must have been sitting out for a long time! Both were as hard as a brick!  So disappointed! I called the manager Michael to let him know how bad it was!

Wish I could leave a good review, however it seems the employees cannot get the orders right to save their life. i have been multiple times with a simple order of a plain turkey and cheese sandwich toasted. Every time they get it wrong, whether with vegetables, not toasted, or just wrong item altogether. When you tell them it is wrong they treat you like the bad person. I do enjoy their food when it is correct, which is rarely. For the price I would expect better service overall. I never like to leave bad reviews, but this has been the case many times and I would like to share my experience.

This was one of the worst experiences I’ve had at Panera Bread. Not only was our order late, but when I finally opened my meal, I found a rotten apple included. Yes — soft, brown, mushy, and clearly spoiled. It’s absolutely unacceptable to serve food in that condition. For a company that prides itself on fresh ingredients, this was a complete failure. If this is the level of quality and service Panera is offering now, I’ll be taking my business elsewhere.
I just ordered Mediterranean salad whole one for $15 When I open it it’s not even half of it salad. They charge us $15for a couple pieces of lettuce.
We love it....food is excellent,  service is awesome and even if you meet friends, no waitress is coming and interrupting the conversation.....really relaxing...

The Croque Monsieur was fantastic- wish they’d keep it on the menu all the time!
Can’t go wrong with the white cheddar Mac- my kiddo loves the bread bowl with Mac, and it comes with a side.
The frozen strawberry lemonade was tasty!

I do not know if it was for the sandwich or for other food that was ordered at the drive-through across the board.

While I was offered a credit, that did not help us because we were looking forward to lunch and we were all disgusted by what we got. We fed it to the dogs and are heading to McDonald’s.  Sad sad sad.  I hope they allow me to post pictures further on down this review.

I will never go to Panera again and leave without checking what my sandwich looks like.

Oh, and the manager justified this by saying that the workers were young. When I was young, I worked and I worked well and nobody complained about my work. This excuse riled me the most.

Nice
Friendly staff , great food, reasonable prices
Great service
First time doing a pick up order, staff was friendly and order was ready

If you don’t want to deal with customers, maybe don’t work in customer service. I arrived at 6:05 AM, just after they opened, and knocked on the door. Donna saw me and straight-up ignored me. When I finally got inside, she was rude and defensive like I was the problem. Thankfully, the manager was professional and took half off my meal, but Donna’s attitude was unacceptable. Do better.

The employees are always excellent! They’ve got a great staff here. But whoever makes the decisions for what gets baked, quantities available, etc. really needs to rethink what they’re doing. They are ALWAYS out of bagels! It’s (supposedly) a bread shop! If you don’t want an Asiago cheese bagel (which is always massively available due to them also having lunch and dinner Asiago bagel sandwiches) you’re out of luck most times! I come twice a week at 9:30 am and the bagel bins are always empty. It didn’t used to be like this years ago. What happened?

The Panera Bread in Gastonia has always been a reliable, friendly, and convenient location for me to grab food and work in a comfortable setting. I recommend it and I appreciate the workers that help to make it a great place for eating, socializing, and working with plenty of natural light and great seating options.

I usually get the toasted Italiano, great sandwich.  Today I decided on the chicken bacon ranch, not bad, but NOT FILLING!!! extremely small sandwich for the price, definitely NOT WORTH IT!!!
$13 for the sandwich a bag of chips and a sweet tea!!! STILL HUNGRY!!!
Next time I'll go to Burger King!!!
Food was fine. Service inconsistent.
Thank you guys!! Melissa H is great, she’s super nice and very helpful
Nice atmosphere, very comfortable seating.  Great coffee ☕️
Loved chicken noodle soup especially on a cold winter day.

The restroom was so dirty. There are 3 stalls. 2 were out of toilet paper & one was stopped up. I needed the handicap stall, but there was no paper. The changing table was down with paper all over it. The walls & floor were horrible!!! There were only 4 customers in the restaurant.
Food slaps, lazy lady at the window don’t ever want to sweeten my tea tho 👎🏼
A lot of choices on the menu to choose from and the prices are reasonable.

I cannot recommend Panera Bread anymore. Their pricing is insane for what you get. The quality is not what it used to be.  Sadly, This is the last time we will he having Panera.

Soup - 3/5

Very customer friendly and awesome staff! Provide nothing but an amazing experience from every end of the table! Absolutely Loved it! Period point blank! Recommended to anyone that love's a good family time for any time of day.
Great food.

I ordered a chicken and noodle soup 1-19-2025 and only5 pieces of carrot!! Who in their right mind does that!!! I thought Panera was supposed to be this top of the line place to go but I guessed I was wrong.

Taylor is the best!!!! She’s always super sweet and extremely helpful!! Sometimes I order online for pickup and sometimes I order for delivery. If I ever have an issue Taylor helps me every time and ensures I get my food!!! Highly recommend!!!

the food was good

Hardly ever out of any items (like a lot of other restaurants). If there is anything I could venture to say negatively, it is occasionally the coffee area is messy and in need of a refill. When I do mention that area lacking attention,  they quickly address the issue and it's typically after the breakfast or lunch rush.

Drop by!

Using the app and drive thru is quick. Always friendly service

Cucumbers,  avocado, hummus, tomato, BREAD….   I understand they are trying to balance the bottom line with food spoilage.  But it sucks when a couple missing items ruins what you want to order.    Otherwise this location is great. 👍

Such a great Panera Bread ! We came in with the Grandkids. Everyone working this late shift tonight was terrific, from placing our order  to preparing food for us all with a happy face!  Great Experience!

Todos lo platillos lucen deliciosos. Yo  probé un sandwich de pechuga de pollo con tocino y adherezo de chipotlemuy rico y una sopa de pollo con nodles en pasta. Quedé satisfecho y con un gran sabor de boca

Love the sandwiches!

Panera food is generally great so don't let this deter you if you're concerned about quality. The lack of stars for this location is specific to the wait time. Drive thru, order ahead, doesn't really seem to matter - It always takes a little bit of extra time past what is expected. Understandably this could be just a time of day issue, or they’re understaffed due to the pandemic, but at that point I would think maybe you turn off order ahead for that location? Other companies use this model and it does work.
Always love their bagels.

If you are seeking healthy options at night, after 8pm, skip this location. They were out of at least 1 item on most sandwiches. Mac and cheese was cold. Worst $15 spent in a long time.

The food purchased looked NOTHING like the food advertised. We had to open our bread to figure out what sandwiches was what. Why present these full looking sandwiches to give a customer 1/4 of what’s in the picture..?!?! Waste of money!!

Really busy during lunch hour, pricey $34 for lunch, WHY? And the cashier decides to pick up my brownie with her dirty gloves she was wearing to woek.yhw register.  Had to complain to manager and he made it right immediately and gave me a free desert.  Will I return, probably not
Can be a bit pricey
Muy buen lugar para reuniones, buen ambiente y servicio rápido.
Fist and last time there. Pics on menu are not what you get. A sub from Harris Teeter is a better value at twice the size and approximately 35% less expensive. Pic of steak sandwich.
I'm from New Jersey. Need my bagels

We ordered ahead through the app and picked up in the drive thru. They forgot my husband’s sandwich in his You Pick Two. When we got home and discovered the error, we tried to call to speak to a manager, but nobody answered.

I submitted a complaint online and hope customer service will respond and credit us the missing item.

Friendly service. Ordered a drink from the sip club and it said it was ready then disappeared on menu board but drink never showed up. Panera's in Gastonia is WONDERFUL!  We love Donna! She is a great asset to the team! The food is delicious and the charged lemonades are next level!

I bounce around coffee shops from Charlotte to Kings Mountain everyday, and none of them compare to the service I get at this Panera! I can always guarantee to walk in and be welcomed with a bright and GENUINE smile from Miss Donna!!

I am big on hospitality and service, and Miss Donna truly cares about each and every person that walks through the door! She keeps me coming back every week and I hope she can make your day like she makes mine!!

THANK YOU MISS DONNA <3

She has never had this experience at other panera's and we won't be coming back. Not sure what happening in the back in but won't be trying it out to see what happens again. Very disappointing.

I normally have my young children with me, hence using curbside pickup. It literally takes me waiting 10-15min afer receiving the email saying it's ready- including me calling and being put on hold before I can get anyone to bring it out. Ever eat at the Gastonia location till they fix management and learn how to wear hair nets and more clean around there food !
